response: <<A RESEARCH ASSISTANT IS DESIGNING AN EXPERIMENT TO TEST THE EFFECTIVENESS OF A NEW DRUG ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE. THE ASSISTANT COLLECTS DATA FROM A SAMPLE OF 50 PATIENTS, RECORDING THEIR BLOOD PRESSURE BEFORE AND AFTER ADMINISTERING THE DRUG. THE DATA COLLECTED IS AS FOLLOWS: PRE-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURE: [X_1, X_2, ..., X_50] POST-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURE: [Y_1, Y_2, ..., Y_50] ASSUME THAT THE PRE-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURES [X_i] ARE NORMALLY DISTRIBUTED WITH MEAN [MU_X] AND VARIANCE [SIGMA_X^2], AND THE POST-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURES [Y_i] ARE NORMALLY DISTRIBUTED WITH MEAN [MU_Y] AND VARIANCE [SIGMA_Y^2]. LET THE COVARIANCE BETWEEN [X_i] AND [Y_i] BE [SIGMA_XY]. 1. DERIVE THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS (MLEs) FOR THE PARAMETERS [MU_X], [MU_Y], [SIGMA_X^2], [SIGMA_Y^2], AND [SIGMA_XY] GIVEN THE DATA. 2. TO TEST THE HYPOTHESIS THAT THE DRUG HAS A SIGNIFICANT EFFECT ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE, FORMULATE AND CONDUCT A HYPOTHESIS TEST USING THE DERIVED MLEs. STATE THE NULL AND ALTERNATIVE HYPOTHESES, THE TEST STATISTIC, AND THE REJECTION CRITERIA AT A SIGNIFICANCE LEVEL OF [ALPHA] = 0.05. THE RESPONSE MUST CONTAIN AT LEAST 8 PLACEHOLDERS REPRESENTED BY SQUARE BRACKETS, SUCH AS [ADDRESS]. IN YOUR ENTIRE RESPONSE, REFRAIN FROM THE USE OF ANY COMMAS. ENCLOSE EVERY WORD IN YOUR RESPONSE IN SQUARE BRACKETS. YOUR ENTIRE RESPONSE SHOULD BE IN ENGLISH, AND IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS. WRAP EVERY WORD BIGRAM IN DOUBLE ANGULAR BRACKETS, SUCH AS [I AM] [AT HOME] [WITH MY] [CUTE DOG].>>
